Our Approach

Structured Transformation

We operate at the intersection of science and sacred knowledge. This is not motivational spirituality. It is structured transformation grounded in experience, education, and measurable inner change.

With over 20 years each in study, practice, and direct client work — we now transmit what once required us to travel the world to find.

Cognitive Transformation

NLP Life Coaching

Structural intervention — not talk therapy. Working at the architecture of identity itself.

Advanced cognitive restructuring and identity transformation through Neuro-Linguistic Programming — a methodology for understanding and reprogramming the structure of human experience.

You are not broken. You are not a collection of problems to be fixed. You are an intelligent system running outdated programs — beliefs formed in childhood, patterns inherited from family systems, strategies adopted during moments of survival that once protected you but now limit you.

NLP doesn't pathologize your experience. It examines the structure of your internal reality — how you construct meaning, store memory, generate emotion, and organize identity — then recodes it at the source. This is not talk therapy. This is structural intervention.

What We Address

• Identity-level transformation — who you believe you are
• Limiting beliefs and unconscious programs
• Self-sabotage patterns and internal conflicts
• Emotional blocks and unprocessed trauma
• Performance blocks in business, relationships, creativity
• Fear, anxiety, procrastination, self-doubt

Core Techniques

Timeline Therapy: Access your unconscious timeline to release emotional charge from past events and limiting decisions made in childhood or adolescence.

Parts Integration: Resolve internal conflicts where different parts of you want opposing things — creating alignment between conscious desire and unconscious resistance.

Belief Change: Identify and transform core beliefs at the unconscious level — beliefs about self-worth, capability, deservingness, safety.

Anchoring & State Management: Install resourceful emotional states and access them on command.

Meta-Model: Linguistic precision to uncover hidden assumptions and distortions in language that reinforce limiting patterns.

This work moves fast. Where traditional therapy can take years, NLP creates shifts in weeks. Not because it bypasses depth — but because it works with the structure of change itself.

Energy Psychology

Energy Psychology & P.E.A.T.

The convergence of ancient healing wisdom and modern consciousness science.

The convergence of ancient healing wisdom and modern consciousness science - from vibrational remedies to rapid polarity integration.

What is Energy Psychology?

Energy Psychology is a family of approaches that work with the body's subtle energy systems to create psychological and emotional healing. Unlike traditional talk therapy, which operates purely at the cognitive level, Energy Psychology recognizes that trauma, belief patterns, and emotional blocks are stored not just in the mind - but in the biofield, meridian system, cellular memory, and energetic architecture of the body.

This field integrates ancient healing traditions (Traditional Chinese Medicine meridians, Ayurvedic energy centers, homeopathic vibrational medicine) with modern neuroscience (polyvagal theory, neuroplasticity, somatic psychology) to create rapid, lasting transformation.

Lineage of Energy Psychology

Homeopathy (1790s - Samuel Hahnemann)

The original vibrational medicine. Homeopathy works on the principle of "like cures like" - ultra-diluted substances that would cause symptoms in a healthy person cure those same symptoms in a sick person. This works not through biochemistry but through energetic resonance. The remedy carries the vibrational signature of the original substance, triggering the body's innate healing intelligence. Modern quantum physics is now validating what homeopaths have known for 200+ years - information can be stored in water's molecular structure.

⚘ Bach Flower Remedies — All 38 Essences

Bach Flower Remedies (1930s - Dr. Edward Bach)

Dr. Bach, a British physician, discovered that flower essences carry specific emotional and spiritual signatures. By capturing the vibrational imprint of flowers in spring water, he created 38 remedies addressing every human emotional state - fear (Mimulus), grief (Star of Bethlehem), overwhelm (Elm), despair (Sweet Chestnut). These aren't placebos. They work through resonance - the flower's energetic pattern rebalances the corresponding emotional pattern in the human biofield. Rescue Remedy (combination of 5 essences) is now used globally for trauma, shock, and acute stress.

EFT - Emotional Freedom Technique (1990s - Gary Craig)

Also called "tapping," EFT combines ancient Chinese acupressure with modern psychology. By tapping on specific meridian endpoints (under the eye, collarbone, under the arm) while focusing on emotional distress, you send calming signals to the amygdala (fear center) and release stuck energy in the meridian system. Research shows EFT reduces cortisol by 24% in one hour, decreases PTSD symptoms by 50-70%, and rewires neural pathways associated with trauma. Veterans, first responders, and trauma survivors worldwide use EFT because it works - fast.

The Science: Why Energy Psychology Works

Polyvagal Theory (Stephen Porges): The vagus nerve is the body's reset button. Energy Psychology techniques stimulate vagal tone, shifting the nervous system from sympathetic (fight/flight) to parasympathetic (rest/digest). This creates the biological foundation for healing.

Neuroplasticity: The brain rewires based on experience. Energy Psychology creates new neural pathways by pairing somatic activation (tapping, breathwork, polarity work) with conscious awareness - literally changing brain structure in real-time.

Biofield Science: Research from HeartMath Institute, Princeton's PEAR lab, and quantum biology shows the human body emits measurable electromagnetic fields that extend 8-10 feet. These fields carry emotional information. Energy Psychology works directly with this biofield to shift patterns before they solidify into physical or psychological symptoms.

From Energy Psychology to P.E.A.T.

All Energy Psychology modalities share one insight: healing happens when we shift the energy pattern underlying the problem. Homeopathy shifts molecular resonance. Bach Flowers shift emotional resonance. EFT shifts meridian flow. And P.E.A.T. - the most advanced Energy Psychology technique - shifts the deepest pattern of all: polarity consciousness itself.

P.E.A.T. Method

Primordial Energy Activation and Transcendence

Most psychological suffering exists because of internal polarities. You are pulled between opposing forces - freedom vs. security, intimacy vs. independence, expression vs. protection. One part of you wants to expand, another contracts in fear. This creates chronic inner conflict, self-sabotage, and exhaustion.

Modern Gestalt therapy and polarity work have shown that integration - not choosing sides - is the path to wholeness. P.E.A.T., created by Zivorad Slavinski, takes this further: it dissolves the polarity entirely, revealing the primordial center beyond duality.

The Psychology of Polarities

If you lean too far left (suffering, victimhood, collapse), you're trapped in pain. If you compensate too far right (positivity bypass, spiritual bypassing, forced optimism), you're denying reality. The truth - and the healing - lives in the center.

This is the core insight of every depth psychology tradition: Jungian shadow work, Gestalt integration, Internal Family Systems, Polyvagal regulation. P.E.A.T. accelerates this process exponentially.

The 9-Step P.E.A.T. Process

Like peeling layers of an onion - or Russian matryoshka dolls - we work from surface symptoms down to the primordial core. Each layer reveals a deeper polarity until we reach the source where all polarities collapse into neutrality.

Step 1: Perception

Identify all elements contributing to the problem - conscious and unconscious.

Step 2: Definition

Clearly define the concrete problem we're working with.

Step 3: Acceptance

Accept the problem fully, eliminating self-sabotage and resistance.

Step 4: Dramatization

Face the most intense components - meet the problem at full strength.

Step 5: Release

Release emotional charge through focused awareness and presence.

Step 6: Stable State

Stabilize into emptiness - the space between polarities.

Step 7: Integration

Integrate polarities into wholeness - dissolving the duality.

Step 8: Permanence

Ensure the transformation is lasting - the problem won't return.

Step 9: Activation

Test the resolution in real-life situations - verify the shift.

What P.E.A.T. Addresses

• Deep emotional charges (anger, grief, fear, shame, guilt)
• Internal conflicts and self-sabotage patterns
• Relationship dynamics rooted in projection and splitting
• Attachment to outcomes and resistance to reality
• Identity-level blocks and fragmented self-perception
• Unresolved trauma stored in the unconscious
• Chronic anxiety, depression, and nervous system dysregulation

The Science Behind P.E.A.T.

Neuroscience research on polarity integration (2018-2024) shows that when opposing neural networks fire simultaneously in alternating attention, the brain creates new integrative pathways. This is called neural coherence — the foundation of emotional regulation and psychological flexibility.

Studies on polyvagal theory (Stephen Porges) demonstrate that oscillating between sympathetic (activation) and parasympathetic (regulation) states trains the nervous system to hold paradox without collapse — the biological foundation of resilience.

P.E.A.T. accelerates this process through structured alternation, bringing polarities into awareness faster than the mind can maintain the illusion of separation. The result: collapse into primordial neutrality where healing happens spontaneously.

Tony Robbins on P.E.A.T.

"P.E.A.T. is one of the most powerful techniques I've encountered for creating profound shifts in consciousness. It dissolves internal conflicts and integrates fragmented aspects of self in ways that traditional methods cannot reach. This is not therapy — this is consciousness engineering."

This is not catharsis. This is not management. This is resolution. The emotional pattern doesn't get suppressed or bypassed — it dissolves at the source, like salt dissolving into water.

Flower Essence Therapy · Dr. Edward Bach

Bach Flower Remedies

38 flower essences + Rescue Remedy. A complete system developed by Dr. Edward Bach to address emotional and psychological imbalances — the foundation of energy medicine for the inner life.

Dr. Edward Bach (1886–1936) was a British physician and bacteriologist who believed the root cause of all illness lies in emotional imbalance. Over years of clinical research, he identified 38 plant-based remedies — each addressing a distinct emotional state — and arranged them into a complete healing system.

Each Bach Flower Remedy corresponds to a specific emotional state or character pattern. Essences are selected according to the client's current inner life — not a medical diagnosis — and can be combined into personalized blends addressing multiple emotional dimensions simultaneously.

The 7 Emotional Categories

1. Fear
2. Uncertainty
3. Insufficient interest in present circumstances
4. Loneliness
5. Oversensitivity to influences and ideas
6. Despondency and despair
7. Overcare for the welfare of others

Sve 38 Esencija + Rescue Remedy

01

Agrimony

Hiding worries behind a cheerful facade. Inner pain, anxiety masked by humor.

02

Aspen

Vague fear and restlessness. Apprehension without known cause. Nameless dread.

03

Beech

Critical, intolerant. Arrogance and fault-finding toward others.

04

Centaury

Weak will, inability to say no. Susceptibility to outside influences.

05

Cerato

Lack of trust in own judgment. Constantly seeks advice and reassurance from others.

06

Cherry Plum

Deep despair, fear of losing control. Irrational thoughts, hysteria.

07

Chestnut Bud

Repeating the same mistakes. Inability to learn from experience. Absent-mindedness.

08

Chicory

Possessiveness, self-centeredness. Clinging, demanding love. Self-pity.

09

Clematis

Dreaminess, unworldliness. Impractical idealists. Lack of ambition and self-respect.

10

Crab Apple

Feeling of uncleanliness and self-disgust. Obsession with appearance and hygiene.

11

Elm

Feeling of inadequacy before high demands. Temporary collapse in perfectionists.

12

Gentian

Reaktivna depresija. Pesimizam, skepsa, obeshrabrenost posle prepreke.

13

Gorse

Deep hopelessness and despair. 'What’s the use.' Defeatism.

14

Heather

Self-preoccupation. Talkativeness, childlike regression.

15

Holly

Envy, jealousy, hatred, suspicion. Alternating love and hatred.

16

Honeysuckle

Living in the past. Nostalgia, homesickness. Emotional exhaustion.

17

Hornbeam

Mentalna iscrpljenost rutinom. 'Ponedeljak jutro' umor. Duhovna iscrpljenost.

18

Impatiens

Impatience, irritability. Always in a hurry, rushing others.

19

Larch

Fear of failure. Feeling of inferiority, low self-confidence.

20

Mimulus

Strah od poznatih stvari: bolesti, tame, visine. Svakodnevna nervoza.

21

Mustard

Deep sadness without visible cause. Melancholy, depression.

22

Oak

Neumorni borci koji ne znaju da se predaju. Za jake koji su dostigli granicu.

23

Olive

Total physical and mental exhaustion. Complete loss of energy.

24

Pine

Feelings of guilt. Self-reproach, taking on others' blame.

25

Red Chestnut

Preterana briga za porodicu i druge. Opsesivno strahovanje za druge.

26

Rock Rose

Panic, terror, sudden fright. Extreme fear, hysteria.

27

Rock Water

Rigidnost, fanatizam. Samopregor, krute ideje, odbijanje zadovoljstava.

28

Scleranthus

Indecision, instability. Extreme variability in behavior and mood.

29

Star of Bethlehem

Shock and trauma. Aftermath of physical or emotional shock. Grief after disappointment.

30

Sweet Chestnut

Total inner despair. Devastating grief. Hopelessness at the edge of endurance.

31

Vervain

Overstraining, fanaticism. Tireless workers who cannot stop.

32

Vine

Tyrannical, domineering, autocratic. Inflexibility, imposing will on others.

33

Walnut

Protection from outside influences during periods of transition: puberty, menopause, divorce.

34

Water Violet

Sense of superiority, aloofness. Loners who enjoy isolation.

35

White Chestnut

Persistent unwanted thoughts. Tormenting inner dialogue that constantly repeats.

36

Wild Oat

Uncertainty, discouragement. Difficulty finding the right path in life.

37

Wild Rose

Apathy, resignation. Surrender without a fight, faint-heartedness.

38

Willow

Resentment, bitterness. Blaming fate and others. Self-pity.

39

Rescue Remedy

Combination: Cherry Plum + Clematis + Impatiens + Rock Rose + Star of Bethlehem. For acute crisis situations.

Personalized Selection

Precision Timing & Sacred Science

Vedic Jyotish Astrology

5,000 years of mathematical precision — revealing dharma, timing and life path.

The ancient science of light — 5,000 years of mathematical precision, predictive intelligence, and remedial wisdom passed down through unbroken lineages from the Himalayan sages to reveal your dharma, timing, and life path.

You were not born randomly. The moment your soul entered this body, the cosmos took a photograph — the exact positions of planets, stars, nakshatras (lunar mansions), and invisible karmic forces were recorded. This is your birth chart. Not a psychological profile. Not a personality test. A blueprint of your soul's journey through time.

Jyotish is not Western astrology. It is astronomy-based, sidereal (star-based), mathematically precise, and designed not to describe who you are — but to reveal when to act, when to wait, and how to align with cosmic intelligence.

Western Astrology vs. Vedic Jyotish

Western Astrology

• Tropical zodiac (based on seasons)
• Sun sign focused
• Psychological interpretation
• Describes personality traits
• Invented ~2,000 years ago
• 23° off from actual star positions

Vedic Jyotish

• Sidereal zodiac (actual star positions)
• Moon & rising sign focused
• Predictive timing science
• Reveals karma, dharma, destiny
• 5,000+ year unbroken lineage
• Astronomically accurate to this day

What Your Jyotish Chart Reveals

Dharma — Your Life Purpose

Not a vague "find yourself" concept. Dharma is what you came here to do — your career direction, creative expression, service to the world. The 10th house reveals your public role. The Atmakaraka planet shows your soul's mission. The Navamsa chart reveals your spiritual purpose.

Dasha Periods — Cosmic Timing

This is where Jyotish becomes predictive. Dasha periods are planetary cycles that activate different areas of your life over time. You might be in a 7-year Venus period (relationships, creativity, wealth) or a 6-year Mars period (action, conflict, initiation). Each Dasha brings specific experiences, challenges, and opportunities. We don't just describe this — we tell you when.

Karma — Repeating Patterns

Why do you keep attracting the same relationship dynamic? Why does money come easily then disappear? Why health issues at certain times? Your chart shows karmic patterns across relationships (7th house), finances (2nd & 11th), health (6th & 8th), family (4th), and spiritual evolution (12th). These aren't punishments — they're assignments.

Relationship Compatibility — Beyond Sun Signs

We analyze Moon compatibility (mind & emotions), Nakshatra compatibility (soul connection), 7th house (partnership), Venus & Mars (attraction & conflict), and Kuja Dosha (Mars afflictions). This goes far beyond "Are you compatible?" to reveal: What is this relationship teaching you? What karma are you working through together?

Health & Vitality — Ayurvedic Constitution

Your chart reveals constitutional strengths and vulnerabilities based on planetary placements, house lords, and Ayurvedic dosha balance (Vata, Pitta, Kapha). The 6th house shows disease tendencies. The 8th house reveals chronic conditions or sudden health events. The 1st house shows vitality. We provide preventative guidance, not just diagnosis.

Remedial Measures — Mantra Shastra from the Himalayas

This is where Jyotish becomes operational. We don't just tell you what's challenging — we give you tools to harmonize planetary influences through sacred Vedic science.

Our lineage comes through Guru Pt. Sanjay Rath, one of the world's foremost Jyotish masters, who has preserved the ancient Mantra Shastra teachings from the Himalayan sages. These are not pop mantras you find online. These are secret, complex, remedial mantras transmitted through initiation and practice.

Types of Remedial Measures

Mantra Japa (Sacred Sound): Specific planetary mantras chanted at precise times, with exact pronunciation, for specific durations. Not "Om Namah Shivaya" repeated casually — but Vedic mantras for Mars (Mangal), Venus (Shukra), Saturn (Shani), Rahu, Ketu, tailored to your chart.

Gemstone Therapy (Ratna Shastra): Wearing specific gemstones to strengthen weak planets or balance afflicted ones. Ruby for Sun, Pearl for Moon, Red Coral for Mars, Emerald for Mercury, Yellow Sapphire for Jupiter, Diamond for Venus, Blue Sapphire for Saturn. Each gemstone must be consecrated, worn on the correct finger, at the correct time.

Fasting & Rituals (Vrata): Observing fasts on specific days aligned with planetary lords. Monday for Moon, Tuesday for Mars, Wednesday for Mercury, Thursday for Jupiter, Friday for Venus, Saturday for Saturn, Sunday for Sun.

Charity & Service (Dana): Donating specific items on specific days to balance karmic debt. Feeding cows on Monday, donating red lentils on Tuesday, giving to Mercury-ruled professions on Wednesday.

Timing Adjustments (Muhurta): Choosing auspicious times for major life events — marriage, business launch, moving, surgery, signing contracts. This alone can shift outcomes dramatically.

The Depth of Jyotish — Multi-Layered Intelligence

Western astrology looks at 12 signs and 10 planets. Jyotish examines:

9 Planets (Grahas)

Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn, Rahu (North Node), Ketu (South Node)

12 Houses (Bhavas)

Each representing life areas — self, wealth, siblings, home, children, enemies, partnerships, death, dharma, career, gains, liberation

27 Nakshatras

Lunar mansions — 13°20' segments revealing soul nature, spiritual path, relationship compatibility

Divisional Charts (Vargas)

Navamsa (marriage), Dasamsa (career), Saptamsa (children), Vimshamsa (spiritual evolution) — 16+ specialized charts

Dasha Systems

Vimshottari Dasha (120-year cycle), Yogini Dasha, Chara Dasha — timing systems of astonishing precision

Yogas (Combinations)

Raja Yoga (power), Dhana Yoga (wealth), Kemadruma Yoga (isolation), Graha Yuddha (planetary war) — hundreds of combinations

"Jyotisha is the eye of the Vedas. It illuminates the path of dharma, reveals the timing of karma, and guides the soul toward moksha (liberation)." — Ancient Vedic saying

What You Receive in a Reading

90-minute comprehensive reading — live session where we go deep into your chart, answer your specific questions, and provide guidance tailored to your current Dasha period and life circumstances

Recording of the session — listen again, take notes, integrate at your own pace

Written summary — key points, planetary positions, current Dasha period, major transits

Personalized remedial measures — specific mantras, gemstone recommendations, timing guidance, fasting days, charity suggestions

Dasha timeline — what to expect in the coming 2-5 years based on your planetary periods

Who This Reading Is For

• Those seeking clarity on life purpose and career direction

• Those navigating major transitions — career change, relationship shift, relocation, health crisis

• Those experiencing repeating patterns in relationships, money, or health and wanting to understand the karmic root

• Those curious about timing — when to launch a business, when to get married, when to avoid major decisions

• Those drawn to spiritual evolution and wanting to align their life with dharma

"The stars do not compel, they impel. Free will exists within the framework of karma. Jyotish reveals the current — you choose whether to swim with it or against it."

Investment

90-minute reading + recording + written summary + remedial measures

Domančić Method · NYC

Bioenergy Healing

Restore Balance. Reduce Pain. Support Your Body Naturally. Practical bioenergy treatments based on the original Zdenko Domančić Method.

No mysticism. No visualization. Just focused, hands-on energetic work designed to support your body's natural recovery processes.

Clients often report:
• noticeable pain reduction during sessions
• deep relaxation and nervous system calming
• functional improvement after a series of treatments

The Natural Foundation of Bioenergy

In moments of discomfort, the human body instinctively turns to touch. A mother naturally places her hands on her child to soothe them. This universal reflex has existed across cultures for centuries and is widely recognized as the natural foundation of bioenergy work.

The Bioenergy Method of Zdenko Domančić has evolved through decades of practical application and observation of a large number of clients. Rather than focusing solely on symptoms, the method aims to support the body's innate regenerative capacity and restore energetic balance.

"The energy healing method used by Zdenko Domančić is very favourable in the subjective assessment of the patients... the benefits for the patients are not questionable. We conclude that the study of the effects and phenomena accompanying Zdenko Domančić's method is a great challenge for science." Ministry of Education, Science and Sport of Slovenia, 2003
"What is a miracle for people is for me a deep knowledge of nature and its possibilities." Zdenko Domančić

When Clients Most Often Seek Bioenergy Support

• Chronic pain and inflammatory conditions
• Hormonal and reproductive imbalances
• Autoimmune challenges
• Migraines and tension headaches
• Sports injuries and recovery
• Cardiovascular strain
• Metabolic disorders including diabetes
• Stress, anxiety, insomnia, and burnout

How the Domančić Method Works

The core principle: the human organism possesses powerful self-regulation mechanisms. Bioenergy treatment is intended to stimulate circulation and energetic flow, reduce blockages, support immune response, and accelerate the body's natural recovery processes.

"Nobody heals the body, the body heals itself. My job is similar to the application of an injection: I don't heal, I help the body to fight on its own." Zdenko Domančić
Reference List

Conditions for Which the Method Is Applied

For informational purposes only. Does not constitute a promise of cure. Energy healing does not replace a visit to a licensed medical professional.

Autoimmune

Lupus, rheumatoid arthritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, Hashimoto thyroiditis, myasthenia gravis, multiple sclerosis

Neurological

Paralysis, muscular dystrophy, ALS, neuropathy, Parkinson's disease, Alzheimer's disease, spinal stenosis, Raynaud syndrome

Cardiovascular

Post-myocardial infarction, coronary artery disease, atherosclerosis, hypertension, hypotension, arrhythmia

Reproductive & Hormonal

Cysts, fibroids, endometriosis, menopause, menstrual disorders, hormonal imbalances, fertility challenges, recurrent miscarriages

Metabolic & Endocrine

Type 1 and 2 diabetes, hyperthyroidism, hypothyroidism, Graves' disease, cholesterol disorders

Musculoskeletal

Scoliosis, kyphosis, herniated disc, osteoporosis, sciatica, low back pain, sports injuries, arthritis

Mental & Emotional

Neurosis, anxiety disorders, depression, insomnia, burnout, chronic stress

Other Conditions

Epilepsy, gangrene, psoriasis, asthma, COPD, kidney disorders, liver disorders, eye conditions, tinnitus, sinusitis, preventive support

Evidence & Documentation

Scientific Research

Zdenko Domančić

The Method · Its Origins

"Bioenergy knows no limitations except those of the practitioner's understanding of nature."

Zdenko Domančić began treating patients in 1972 in the former Yugoslavia. What followed — documented cancer remissions, reversal of degenerative conditions, and gangrene recovery without amputation — attracted the attention of academic researchers, ministers, and medical institutions across Europe.

🔬 Oncology Research

Institute of Oncology, Ljubljana — 2007

Prof. Dr. Radovan Starc led a multidisciplinary team examining bioenergy treatment on cultures of aggressive cancer cells — endothelial cells, ovarian carcinoma, melanoma, and colorectal cancer. After 10 minutes of Domančić-method treatment, malignant cell colonies showed approximately 20% reduction in growth. Healthy cells were unaffected. The study established a measurable biological distinction in cellular response.

🏥 Clinical Observation

Clinical Observation in Zagreb (1984)

In 1984, Zdenko Domančić presented his bioenergy method before a group of medical professionals in Zagreb — his first formal exposure to a critical audience of physicians and specialists, with the intention of examining whether the method could withstand professional scrutiny.

A group of patients diagnosed with advanced gangrene was selected. At that time, their prognosis involved either limb amputation or a fatal outcome. Following a series of bioenergy treatments, significant improvements were observed. The patients who had been facing amputation regained mobility, and none required surgical removal of a limb.

The observations later inspired journalist Dražen Jakčin to publish a book in 1986 titled The Healer Domančić: Treatment with Bioenergy – A Report from Scientific Research, documenting the events and testimonies surrounding the case.

Dr. Josip Čiček, an internist who personally followed the outcomes, reflected: "Based on established medical expectations, this individual had only days to live. Yet the patient remained alive and continued to show improvement. Had I not witnessed it myself, I would have struggled to accept it."

Scanning electron microscopy (SEM) — before and after bioenergetic exposure. Jožef Stefan Institute, Ljubljana, 2003.

⚗️ Material Science · Research

HEALING WITH BIOENERGY

According to the Zdenko Domančić Method

Prof. Dr. Radovan Starc — Research on the Effects of Bioenergy on Matter

The phenomenon of bioenergy and its measurable influence on physical matter has attracted attention beyond the field of complementary medicine. Zdenko Domančić presented his work internationally, including in the United States and at Ben-Gurion University in Israel. His research activities and demonstrations were observed by visitors and academics from institutions such as Stanford University and Columbia University, as well as Israeli scientific circles.

A significant laboratory examination was conducted in 2003 at the Jožef Stefan Institute in Ljubljana. The study focused on the influence of bioenergy on calcium carbonate (calcite) crystals suspended in an aqueous solution contained within a silicon tube. After exposure to bioenergy, the samples were examined using scanning electron microscopy (SEM).

The analysis was performed and documented by Dr. Anton Jeglič, professor at the Faculty of Electrical Engineering at the University of Ljubljana, and Prof. Dr. Spomenka Kobe of the Jožef Stefan Institute. The SEM technology employed provides magnifications up to 100,000 times and detection of structures at the nanometer scale (0.1–0.2 nm).

Structural Changes in Crystal Formation

Following bioenergetic exposure, observable changes in crystal morphology were documented. Instead of maintaining conventional geometric patterns, certain calcite formations developed complex, organic-like structures resembling botanical forms — leaves and floral shapes with detailed surface textures visible at the microscopic level. The average size of the examined crystals was approximately 3 micrometers.

Crystals in their growth phase are highly responsive to environmental influences and informational input — they were selected as the experimental medium precisely because the working hypothesis posited that if bioenergy carries informational properties, such influence might become visible in crystallization processes.

Measured Physical Effects

In addition to morphological observations, researchers reported measurable physical changes. Under bioenergetic influence, the electrical conductivity of calcium carbonate in solution demonstrated a noticeable decrease. Furthermore, structural changes were observed in commercially bottled water, with reported variations of up to 51% in specific measurable properties following exposure.

About the Jožef Stefan Institute

The largest scientific research institution in Slovenia, employing more than 900 researchers across physics, chemistry, molecular biology, nanotechnology, nuclear engineering, and environmental sciences. Its mission is the advancement and dissemination of scientific knowledge at internationally recognized standards.

Subconscious Transformation

ThetaHealing®

Transform Your Inner Patterns. Heal, Protect, and Elevate Your Life. Sessions available in New York City and online worldwide.

ThetaHealing® is a globally recognized spiritual and personal development method founded by Vianna Stibal. Through a focused and deeply relaxed Theta brainwave state, the practitioner guides the client into a space where subconscious patterns can be observed with greater clarity.

As limiting beliefs begin to shift, many individuals report increased emotional ease, improved mental clarity, and a stronger sense of inner stability. The process is gentle, structured, and highly individualized.

What Is ThetaHealing

ThetaHealing combines focused awareness, meditative Theta brainwave access, and structured belief work. Within the Theta state, the mind enters a deeply relaxed yet aware condition where underlying emotional patterns, inherited belief systems, and long-standing internal narratives become more accessible.

Many clients use this process to:
• Identify limiting subconscious programs
• Support emotional release
• Develop more supportive inner patterns
• Increase clarity and personal direction
• Strengthen emotional resilience

A Refined Deep Dive Approach

This work goes beyond surface level relaxation. ThetaHealing sessions are designed for individuals ready to explore deeper emotional layers and long-standing internal patterns. Clients often seek this work when they want to explore the roots of repeating life patterns, release long-held emotional imprints, and reconnect with purpose and direction.

ThetaHealing is intended to complement, not replace, conventional medical or psychological care. Clients are always encouraged to continue working with their medical professionals for any health-related concerns.

Your Practitioner

Work With Jose Mejia

Sessions are led by Jose Mejia, a certified ThetaHealing Practitioner and Instructor trained within the official lineage of Vianna Stibal. Born in Colombia and originally educated as a radiofrequency engineer, Jose brings scientific rigor and analytical precision to every session. Based in New York City and working with clients worldwide online, he is known for his calm, focused presence and depth-oriented approach.

His work is especially valued by clients ready to move beyond surface-level techniques and gently explore deeper emotional material — including early emotional imprints, long-standing fear patterns, anxiety states, depressive emotional loops, and deeply rooted subconscious blocks — in a structured and supportive environment.

Mind-Body Connection

Biodecoding

Decode the message. Restore inner balance. Discover the emotional roots of physical symptoms.

Biodecoding is a refined complementary therapeutic approach that explores the possible emotional, subconscious, and transgenerational factors connected to physical symptoms and recurring life patterns. Sessions are available in New York City and online worldwide.

Biodecoding operates from the perspective that the body is not working against us. Certain physical or emotional patterns may represent adaptive biological responses to overwhelming or unresolved stress experiences. Through structured and guided sessions, clients are supported in exploring the deeper meaning behind symptoms, behaviors, and repeating life situations.

Core Principles

Emotional Component of Symptoms

Symptoms are viewed as meaningful signals that may reflect unresolved internal stress. Sessions carefully explore the timeline and emotional context in which patterns first appeared.

Biological Logic

Biodecoding studies the functional meaning of organs and systems, examining how different stress experiences may correlate with different bodily responses.

Mind-Brain-Body Connection

The method works with the understanding that emotional experience, neurological processing, and physical expression are continuously interconnected.

Transgenerational Influence

Some recurring patterns may be explored in the context of family history and inherited emotional imprints — always approached individually and respectfully.

How the Process Works

Step 1 — Clarifying the Presenting Pattern

The session begins by identifying the physical, emotional, or behavioral pattern the client wishes to explore.

Step 2 — Tracing the Stress Timeline

Through focused dialogue and guided awareness, the practitioner helps the client identify when the pattern first emerged and what life circumstances surrounded it.

Step 3 — Conscious Integration

Using relaxation-based methods and structured questioning, previously unconscious material may become available for processing.

Step 4 — Supporting New Adaptation

As perception evolves, many clients report greater emotional ease, improved clarity, and more flexible responses to previously triggering situations.

What Biodecoding May Support

Clients commonly seek biodecoding sessions for support with: chronic or recurring physical symptoms · psychosomatic patterns · emotional stress and anxiety states · recurring life difficulties · inherited family patterns · personal growth and self-awareness · weight management challenges linked to lifestyle imbalance.

Nutritional Balance & Weight Support

As part of a comprehensive integrative approach, Jose Mejia also offers personalized nutritional guidance and structured meal planning, including support for individuals experiencing metabolic imbalance. Each nutrition plan is individualized and aligned with the client's broader emotional, energetic, and lifestyle profile — designed to support healthy weight management, improve nutritional balance, reduce stress-related eating patterns, and stabilize energy levels.

Work With Jose Mejia

Through his extensive experience in ThetaHealing, Bioenergy therapies, biodecoding, and personalized nutritional planning, Jose brings together knowledge from multiple disciplines to support each client with precision and care. His work is recognized for its depth, professionalism, and highly attentive presence. Rather than applying a generic model, he evaluates each individual as a unique system and adapts the process accordingly.

Shamanic Healing

Soul Retrieval & Shadow Work

Recover Your Energy. Restore Your Wholeness. Reclaim Your Vitality. Sessions available in New York City and online worldwide.

Soul Retrieval is an ancient shamanic healing practice focused on recovering and reintegrating fragmented aspects of the self that may have separated during periods of shock, trauma, or overwhelming stress. This deeply restorative process is designed to support the return from fragmentation toward greater wholeness, presence, and inner stability.

Discover the Parts of You Ready to Return

In many shamanic traditions, it is understood that during intense emotional or physical stress, a protective response may occur in which aspects of the psyche or energy field withdraw as a survival mechanism. Over time, this may be experienced as:

• Emotional numbness or persistent emptiness
• Feeling incomplete or disconnected
• Chronic fatigue without clear explanation
• Difficulty moving forward in life
• Repeating emotional or relationship patterns
• Reduced sense of vitality or joy

Soul Retrieval work gently supports the reintegration of these withdrawn aspects so the individual may feel more present, grounded, and internally aligned.

The Shamanic Roots

The modern Western understanding of Soul Retrieval was significantly influenced by the work of Michael Harner, the American anthropologist and founder of the Foundation for Shamanic Studies. Through the development of Core Shamanism, Harner synthesized cross-cultural shamanic practices into a framework accessible to contemporary practitioners.

His work with shamanic journeying helped bridge traditional indigenous knowledge — particularly from South American and Amazonian lineages — into modern integrative healing environments. Subsequent teachers expanded these methods with greater therapeutic sensitivity while maintaining respect for their traditional origins.

The Soul Retrieval Process

1. Entering the Shamanic State

The practitioner enters a focused altered state of awareness, often supported by rhythmic sound such as drumming.

2. Tracking the Withdrawn Aspect

Within this expanded awareness, the practitioner symbolically locates the withdrawn soul aspect and the context in which it separated.

3. Energetic Reintegration

Once located, the retrieved aspect is ceremonially reintegrated into the client's energy field in a calm and respectful manner.

4. Integration Support

A crucial phase: helping the client stabilize and embody the returning energy in everyday life. Individual experiences vary.

The Map of Return

The Four Chamber Model of the Soul

Some modern shamanic frameworks describe the healing journey through four progressive phases — a structured and compassionate pathway for deep inner restoration.

I

Recognition

Recognition of the original wound that disrupted the life path.

II

Identification

Identification of limiting beliefs or protective patterns formed at the time of the trauma.

III

Restoration

Restoration of trust, vitality, and emotional flow.

IV

Reconnection

Reconnection with authentic direction, purpose, and inner calling.

Shadow Work & Archetypal Integration

The shadow is not the enemy. It is the repository of everything we were taught to suppress. Shadow work, rooted in the archetypal psychology of Carl Jung, is the conscious process of bringing hidden aspects into relationship with the conscious self.

The cave you fear to enter holds the treasure you seek. Joseph Campbell

The Dark Night of the Soul is not a crisis to be escaped. It is an initiatory passage — a necessary dissolution that every serious spiritual practitioner encounters on the path. What feels like breakdown is, in truth, a breaking open.

Future Vision

Advanced Training in Soul Retrieval

Advanced training in Soul Retrieval and shamanic journey work is planned for the future. These programs will be offered selectively and are intended only for individuals who demonstrate a sincere calling and natural sensitivity for shamanic work. The training pathway will emphasize responsibility, grounded practice, and deep respect for the traditional roots of this method. Details will be announced when enrollment becomes available.

28-Day Private Immersion

PhiLuminous CODEX™

A high-intensity, precision-calibrated transformational container. Private. Structured. Irreversible.

A high-intensity, precision-calibrated transformational container designed to create structural integration across cognitive, energetic, subconscious, and strategic layers of experience.

This is not coaching in the usual sense. It is a calibrated 28-day private immersion inside a structured transformation architecture involving psychology, field regulation, subconscious recoding, and strategic alignment.

What the 28-Day Immersion Includes

  • Four private 90-minute immersive sessions spread across one 28-day cycle
  • Initial Alignment Scan to decode psychological, energetic, and strategic architecture
  • Advanced NLP Coaching Sessions to examine and restructure cognitive frameworks
  • Bioenergy Healing Sessions focused on full body and biofield regulation
  • Theta Healing Sessions with structured subconscious downloading
  • Applied astrological timing and life positioning guidance
  • Direct communication access between sessions for integration support

Each immersion is individually engineered. No templates. No generic pathways.

The 28-Day Structural Progression

Week 1 - Structural Clarity and Field Stabilization

Work begins with decoding internal architecture and establishing coherence. Applied astrological blueprint analysis informs the Initial Alignment Scan. Advanced NLP Sessions clarify identity structures. Bioenergy Sessions regulate the nervous system and biofield, creating a foundation of stability before deeper work begins.

Week 2 - Subconscious Reconfiguration

Work moves beneath conscious awareness. Theta Healing Sessions examine subconscious belief systems and emotional encoding. Structured downloading processes coordinate new internal frameworks. Bioenergy Healing continues to support systemic coherence during this repatterning phase.

Week 3 - Strategic Positioning and Remedial Alignment

Recalibrated internal structure translates into strategic positioning. Applied astrological timing used as an operational map for the next 12-24 months. Remedial alignment measures include lifestyle adjustments, rhythm and timing corrections, and focused behavioral recalibration.

Week 4 - Integration and Anchored Alignment

This phase consolidates previous work into coherent internal structure. Shamanic drumming for rhythmic field entrainment. Deep biofield recalibration. Soul retrieval or ancestral integration where indicated. Initiation into a structured personal mantra as an internal alignment anchor.

Who This Is For

  • Those navigating transition, expansion, or realignment
  • Those experiencing internal contradictions that interfere with action
  • Those seeking structured transformation, not incremental improvement
  • Those who value precision, depth, and integration
  • Those ready for intentional structural change

Admission by application only. Each cycle is individually calibrated and offered following a qualification conversation.

Metatron Hunter 4025 NLS · Bioresonance System

The Technology

What Is the Metatron Hunter 4025?

The Metatron Hunter 4025 NLS is a non-linear bioresonance diagnostic system — developed through decades of biophysics research. Using a specialized headset, it reads the electromagnetic oscillations emitted by every organ, tissue, and cell in your body, comparing them against an internal reference database of 72,000+ anatomical points.

The result: a comprehensive 3D color-coded map of your body's current energetic state. Organs and tissues are rendered in anatomical detail, with color indicators showing the degree of functional deviation from optimal — from green (healthy) through orange and red (stressed, compromised).

The system also suggests resonant interventions — homeopathic, herbal (phytotherapy), mineral (lithotherapy), and nutritional — and can generate a personalized bioresonance preparation via the built-in Reprinter module.

Real Software · Real Sessions

What You See During a Scan

Every organ rendered in 3D. Every measurement point color-coded. Real-time waveform analysis. And on the right — the specific remedy that resonates strongest with that tissue right now.

Organ Scan — Intestine

Each symbol represents a measurement cluster. Waveform graph compares client's frequency signature against optimal reference — deviations visible in real time.

Neurological + Remedy Suggestion

Brain cross-section with lithotherapy (crystal) resonance identified. The system matches specific minerals to exact tissue zones showing stress signatures.

Phytotherapy Resonance

Herbal remedy identified by the system for the highlighted zone. The plant with strongest energetic resonance is displayed — specific to that tissue at this moment.

Comparative Analysis — Before & After

Side-by-side view of the same organ pre- and post-META-therapy. Improvement and worsening tracked against baseline — with graph overlay for trend visualization.

Scope of Analysis

72,000 Points. Every System.

Brain cross-sections, cranial nerves, spinal cord, autonomic nervous system

Heart, arteries, veins, lymphatic system, blood composition markers

Foundational Detox

Ionic Foot Detox

Bioelectric Reset from the Ground Up

Modern life places a continuous load on the body. Environmental exposure, stress, dietary imbalance, and metabolic byproducts can contribute to fatigue, heaviness, and reduced vitality. Supporting the body's natural detox pathways is essential for long-term balance.

The feet serve as one of the most significant reflex and grounding zones of the entire organism. Thousands of nerve endings and reflex points correspond to major organs and systems. Working through the soles allows the body to respond systemically from its foundation.

During the session, the feet are immersed in warm water enriched with Epsom salt (magnesium sulfate) and mineral elements. A professional ionic array is activated — creating an active ionic environment. As the body interacts with this field through the pores and reflex zones of the feet, the session supports circulation, grounding, and the body's natural elimination mechanisms.

Color Intelligence

What Your Aura Colors Mean

Each color zone maps to a specific chakra and life domain. The practitioner interprets the full picture — not just the dominant color, but the patterns, edges, and gradients within.

Red

Vitality, passion, physical strength. Root chakra — groundedness and life force.

Orange

Creativity, sensuality, emotional flow. Sacral chakra — the seat of desire and expression.

Yellow

Personal power, confidence, clarity. Solar plexus — will, identity, self-determination.

Green

Healing, balance, deep compassion. Heart chakra — the bridge between earth and spirit.

Blue

Communication, truth, intuition. Throat and third eye — authentic expression and inner knowing.

Violet

Spiritual sight, transformation, higher consciousness. The third eye awakening.

Gold / White

Divine connection, clarity, energetic mastery. Crown chakra — pure awareness and luminous presence.

Pink

Love, sensitivity, emotional openness. A gentle, receptive heart field in active expression.

Our Story

The PhiLuminous Vision

We walked it. We structured it. Now we transmit it.

PhiLuminous was not created as a brand. It emerged as a response.

After decades of study, field work, disciplined training, and lived transformation across continents, a question became unavoidable: how can profound knowledge be translated into a coherent, responsible, and applicable system for the modern human being?

In 2022, in New York City, two long and independent paths converged. Not paths shaped by trend-based spirituality or surface inspiration, but by structured study, direct practice, initiatory experience, and measurable inner work.

PhiLuminous was born from that convergence.

It represents the decision to integrate what is often fragmented - symbolic intelligence and psychological structure, energy-based practice and disciplined analysis, ancestral insight and modern responsibility.

The result is the PhiLuminous Method™ - a structured framework designed to support clarity, coherence, and sustainable inner transformation in a world defined by noise and acceleration.

This is not a philosophy detached from life. It is a system built from lived experience.

The Founders

Dave Mitrovic

Founder · PhiLuminous Method™

Dave Mitrovic is an integrative transformation specialist and founder of the PhiLuminous Method™, bridging Energy Psychology, Astrology, NLP Coaching, P.E.A.T Therapy, and Bioenergy Healing. Trained at Kepler University and across multiple continents, his work integrates symbolic intelligence with practical transformational structure.

Read More

Jose Mejia

ThetaHealing® · Bioenergy · Biodecoding

Jose Mejia is a certified ThetaHealing® Practitioner and Instructor, Bioenergy Healer, and Biodecoding practitioner born in Colombia and originally trained as a radiofrequency engineer. His practice bridges scientific precision with deep inner work, supporting clients in New York and worldwide.

Read More

Our Mission

PhiLuminous was created for those seeking clarity, healing, and alignment between body, mind, and soul. For those who sense that symptoms are messages. For those who understand that consciousness shapes biology.

φ

To integrate psychology, frequency science, and ancestral wisdom into one coherent framework. To bridge hermetic intelligence with contemporary neuroscience and quantum-informed practice. To replace confusion with structure. To replace fragmentation with integration. To transmit clarity through disciplined, ethical, and professional work.

PhiLuminous exists so that the path toward alignment does not have to be walked blindly.

This is not branding. This is applied mastery expressed through service.

True transformation begins where responsibility meets awareness.

Begin Your Journey
Founder · New York City & Worldwide

Dave Mitrovic

Integrative Transformation Specialist. Founder of the PhiLuminous Method™.

Dave Mitrovic

Energy Psychology · Astrology · NLP · Bioenergy · Founder of PhiLuminous Method™

Dave Mitrovic is an integrative transformation specialist whose work bridges Energy Psychology, Astrology, NLP Coaching, P.E.A.T Therapy, and Bioenergy Healing within the broader framework of Energy Medicine. He integrates psychological structure with precise energetic recalibration to support measurable inner change.

He is the founder and creator of the PhiLuminous Method™, a structured transformational system that integrates symbolic intelligence, transgenerational insight, energy-based practice, and psychological clarity into a coherent and responsible framework for human development.

His professional foundation was shaped through four years of advanced study in Professional Astrology at Kepler University in Belgrade, where he earned internationally recognized certifications as a Hermetic Astrologer, along with advanced diplomas in Astro-Medicine and Astro-Psychology. For Dave, Astrology has never been about prediction. It is a symbolic language that reveals psychological patterns, archetypal structures, and developmental timing within an individual's life.

Alongside his academic formation, Dave completed advanced training in Bioenergy Healing through the Advanced Bioenergy Development Program under the guidance of internationally recognized bioenergy practitioner Ljubisa Stojanovic in Belgrade, Europe. He later refined his expertise through the European method of Zdenko Domancic of Slovenia, a structured bioenergetic system recognized within integrative medical and complementary therapeutic communities across Europe and beyond.

The Domancic framework emphasizes disciplined energetic assessment and systematic regulation, supporting the organism's inherent capacity for balance across multiple categories of functional imbalance. This rigorous education shaped Dave's understanding of Energy Medicine as a precise and responsible field of practice.

His path led him across Europe, the United States, Peru, and Australia, where he engaged in immersive study with indigenous elders and traditional practitioners. Rather than romanticizing these traditions, he approached them with disciplined inquiry and responsibility, integrating their principles into a coherent and structured transformational system.

He also deepened his spiritual education through long-term study of Original Kabbalah under Rav Dr. Michael Laitman, PhD, founder of the Bnei Baruch Kabbalah Education and Research Institute in Petah Tikva, Israel. This lineage traces back to Rav Yehuda Ashlag (Baal HaSulam) and Rabash, whose teachings present Kabbalah as a structured system of inner development. Through this ongoing study, Dave developed refined perception and interpretative skill in decoding deeper layers of meaning embedded within human experience, beyond the immediate filters of ego and the natural limitations of sensory perception.

Clients around the world often describe working with Dave as grounding, direct, and strategically clear. His work is not limited to analysis. It is experiential, integrative, and restorative in nature.

During his years of immersive study in South America, he was introduced to traditional practices such as Soul Retrieval and ceremonial drumming processes aimed at restoring fragmented aspects of the self. Within these traditions, the concept of a Power Animal symbolized instinctual strength and lost vitality. In contemporary psychological language, this dimension parallels the integration of the inner child and previously disowned emotional aspects of the personality.

For many years, he also worked extensively with Family Constellations, a systemic modality that expanded his understanding of transgenerational dynamics and unconscious loyalty patterns within family structures.

Through NLP Coaching and P.E.A.T Therapy, he refined the PhiLuminous Method™ into a practical and applicable system designed to help individuals resolve internal fragmentation, integrate inherited patterns, and align their actions with deeper intention.

For Dave, transformation is not about becoming someone else. It is about returning to who you truly are beneath pressure and expectation, and living from your true center with clarity, responsibility, and inner wholeness. In that place, freedom is no longer an escape, but a conscious commitment to your own life and being.

Dave serves clients internationally, both in person and online. If you are prepared to engage your growth with clarity and intention through the PhiLuminous Method™, Dave welcomes you to begin this work. Sessions are available in New York and online internationally.

Schedule Your Private Session
Practitioner · New York City & Worldwide

Jose Mejia

Engineer. Healer. Guide. Bridging the precision of science with the depth of transformative practice.

Jose Mejia

ThetaHealing® · Bioenergy · Biodecoding · Nutrition

Jose Mejia was born in Colombia and from an early age carried a persistent question about what truly creates health, suffering, and change in a human life. His curiosity was never limited to technique. He was driven by the search for meaning, for root causes, and for answers that could help the modern individual navigate complexity without losing inner balance.

His professional path began in engineering, where he trained as a radiofrequency engineer working with signal systems and frequency dynamics. While others saw circuits and measurements, he saw patterns. The language of frequency became the bridge between science and the invisible structures shaping human experience.

His career required him to live and work across multiple continents in Latin America, Africa, Europe, and North America. Each relocation deepened his perspective. Travel became education. Exposure to diverse cultures and healing traditions refined both his analytical precision and intuitive awareness. What began as scientific exploration gradually evolved into embodied practice.

In 2015 he encountered ThetaHealing®, and what began as professional curiosity quickly became a deeply personal turning point. Through his own inner work, he confronted long-standing emotional patterns, limiting beliefs, and inherited narratives that had quietly shaped his life. The process was not theoretical. It was experiential, transformative, and at times challenging.

He witnessed how shifts at the subconscious level could alter perception, relationships, health, and direction. The changes were not superficial adjustments but fundamental realignments. ThetaHealing® did not simply add a new skill to his professional path; it reshaped his understanding of responsibility, choice, and possibility.

Certifications & Training

Since then, he has trained extensively within the official lineage of Vianna Stibal and senior instructors worldwide. Jose is a certified ThetaHealing Practitioner and Instructor in:

Basic DNA

Advanced DNA

Dig Deeper

Manifesting and Abundance

Soul Mate

RHYTHM to a Perfect Weight

He has completed advanced practitioner certifications including Intuitive Anatomy, DNA 3, World Relations, You and the Creator, Planes of Existence, You and Your Inner Circle, Love of Self, Disease and Disorder, and additional elective programs such as Game of Life, Family Ties, and Wealth Consciousness.

Integrated Modalities

Alongside ThetaHealing®, Jose integrates Bioenergy Healing and Biodecoding into his work.

Bioenergy Healing

Bioenergy Healing in his practice follows the method developed by Zdenko Domancic of Slovenia, a structured European system of bioenergetic work recognized within integrative and complementary therapeutic circles. The Domancic method approaches the human organism as both biological and energetic. Through focused bioenergetic radiation techniques, the practitioner supports energetic alignment, balancing of the auric field, and stimulation of the body's natural regulatory processes. It is applied as a complementary practice and does not replace medical diagnosis or treatment.

Biodecoding

Biodecoding explores the potential emotional and ancestral roots of physical symptoms. It is based on the understanding that unresolved emotional stress may manifest biologically as adaptive responses. In his sessions, Jose helps clients identify subconscious patterns that may have originated in early life experiences or family lineage, facilitating awareness and emotional release. This work is practiced alongside, not in place of, conventional medical care.

Holistic Nutrition & Dietary Strategy

In addition, Jose designs personalized dietary strategies and holistic nutrition plans tailored to each client's metabolic profile, lifestyle demands, and therapeutic objectives. His nutritional work incorporates principles of metabolic balance and systemic regulation, recognizing that sustainable healing requires physiological stability as well as emotional coherence. Rather than offering generic diet templates, he develops individualized protocols that support resilience, clarity, and long-term integration.

Presence & Practice

Today, Jose lives and works in New York, serving clients both in person and online. He works with individuals across the United States, Latin America, Europe, and beyond, supporting transformation with equal dedication regardless of distance.

Jose continues to study internationally. For him, learning is not episodic but ongoing. His work reflects both disciplined inquiry and lived experience. Clients often describe his presence as calm, focused, and grounded. His engineering precision ensures structure. His search for meaning ensures depth.

He does not claim to cure disease.

He works to restore alignment, awareness, and personal responsibility.

Jose understands that healing is not about quick fixes, but about clarity, courage, and consistency. Because he has walked through his own transformative process, he brings not only knowledge but depth, experience, and genuine empathy into his sessions. He walks alongside his clients with presence and respect, supporting them as they reconnect with their own strength and capacity to create meaningful change.

"True healing begins the moment we stop fighting our story and start understanding it."

For him, this work is not a role. It is a commitment to helping individuals move from confusion to clarity, from inherited patterns to conscious choice, and from imbalance to integration.

And at the heart of it all, he believes that no one is bound by their past; awareness creates the space where a new future becomes possible.
